identity.name: The Grand Line Logbook
identity.description: An immersive pirate RPG interface that feels like a physical logbook found on the Thousand Sunny, enhanced with Haki-infused digital overlays.
identity.visual_hook: Wood, Gold, Old Paper, and Neon Haki Effects

headings.usage: Page titles, Wanted Poster names, 'Victory' text

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#F9A602] text-[#3E2723] border-2 border-[#5D4037] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#3E2723] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#5D4037] text-[#F4E4BC] border-2 border-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#3E2723] shadow-md
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white border-2 border-black hover:bg-red-700 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000000]

cards.wanted_poster: bg-[#F4E4BC] text-[#3E2723] border-4 border-double border-[#5D4037] shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden font-serif
cards.glass_panel: bg-[#0F1C2E]/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#D4AF37]/30 text-[#F4E4BC] shadow-2xl rounded-xl

inputs.scroll_style: bg-[#F4E4BC] border-2 border-[#5D4037] text-[#3E2723] placeholder:text-[#5D4037]/60 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-serif

layout_strategies.general: Mobile-first. Use 'p-4' as base spacing. Center main interactions but allow exploring edges.
layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4. Hero stats col-span-12 md:col-span-8. Inventory col-span-6 md:col-span-4.
layout_strategies.combat_screen: Split screen: Top half = Enemy view (Perspective), Bottom half = Action Deck (Controls). Floating damage numbers.

motion_guidelines.haki_effect: On critical actions, flash screen with purple/black overlay.
motion_guidelines.hover: Scale 1.05 on hover for cards. Buttons shift up.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx

critical_rules: DO NOT use the default white shadcn card. Override it with 'bg-[#F4E4BC]' or 'bg-[#0F1C2E]'.
Use 'Cinzel Decorative' from Google Fonts. Import it in index.css.
The 'Wanted Poster' component is mandatory for the Profile and Avatar Builder.
Use 'lucide-react' icons: Skull for death/danger, Anchor for home, Map for exploration, Swords for combat.
Combat screen must look like a JRPG turn-based HUD.
Map screen must look like a parchment map with interactive nodes.
